## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes (if dashboard changed)
- [ ] The change is focused — one logical change per PR
- [ ] I followed [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) for my commit messages
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal data are included in the diff
- [ ] I updated docs / CHANGELOG where relevant
